name: Turkey Jalapeno Sausage Reuben
recipeIngredient: 3 Jalapeno Chile peppers, seeded and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat the bacon fat on medium until hot.
2. Saute onions and garlic for 4 to 5 minutes, or until onions are tender.
3. Let the vegetables cool (about 10-15 mins.), then puree them.
4. In a large bowl, combine jalapeno Chile peppers, bread crumbs, milk, salt, and pureed onions. Mix well.
5. In a medium bowl, whisk together egg, egg white, and heavy cream.
6. Add oil and ground turkey to the egg mixture; mix with hands until combined. Add cilantro and mix in.
7. Fold in the bread crumb mixture. Shape meat into 8 patties, each about the size of the bread slices.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Bake patties for 10 minutes on each side, or until firm.
9. Place a slice of cheese and tomato on each bread slice. Broil under a preheated broiler until cheese melts.
10. Place one baked sausage patty on top of each grilled bread piece. Top with Southwestern Slaw. Serve Black Bean relish on the side.
[ mcRecipe 28 Au 96 / patH !caution: 720 cals / 48 g
fat ]
NOTES : These turkey patties are baked at 350°F (180°C) topped with cheese and tomato, which is broiled.
Serve with Southwestern Slaw and Black Bean Relish. "Once you get all of the ingredients gathered,
this is very easy to put together." The restaurant serves sausage links. This recipe is simpler.
When ready to form patties, coat hands with some oil." - Executive Chef Bill Connelly.
